arguments.old_string:
let r_a = self.shallow_resolve(predicate.skip_binder().a);
        let r_b = self.shallow_resolve(predicate.skip_binder().b);
arguments.new_string:
let r_a = self.shallow_resolve(predicate.skip_binder().sub_ty);
        let r_b = self.shallow_resolve(predicate.skip_binder().super_ty);

arguments.old_string: Subtype(ExpectedFound<Ty<'tcx>>, TypeError<'tcx>), // always comes from a SubtypePredicate
arguments.new_string: Subtype(ExpectedFound<Ty<'tcx>>, TypeError<'tcx>), // always comes from a SubtypeRelation

arguments.old_string: SubType(SubtypePredicate),
arguments.new_string: SubType(SubtypeRelation),
